arts.ttl: Feyenoord set €40m price tag for AC Milan target Santi Giménez
arts.sum: Feyenoord set imposing fee as Santiago Giménez continues to be the subject of strong interest from AC Milan.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich snap up German talent Tom Bischof on long-term deal
arts.sum: Hoffenheim’s Tom Bischof (19) has signed a long-term contract with Bayern Munich until at least 2029 after passing a medical, according to Florian Plettenberg. The German midfielder will join up…

arts.ttl: New details emerge as Bayern look to finalize contract talks with Davies
arts.sum: Sky Germany has revealed some new details about the new contract on the table for Alphonso Davies at Bayern.

arts.ttl: The details of Alphonso Davies’ new deal at Bayern Munich
arts.sum: For over a year, the future of Bayern Munich left-back Alphonso Davies has been up in the air. With significant interest from Real Madrid, as to where the Canadian international…

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich want to sign Jonas Urbig this month, regardless of Daniel Peretz leaving or not
arts.sum: Bayern want to sign Jonas Urbig this month regardless of whether Daniel Peretz leaves on loan or stays. The goalkeeper position is one that Bayern Munich wants to tie down as that player will eventually replace Manuel Neuer.

arts.ttl: Marseille enquire about Marcus Rashford and Chelsea target Mathys Tel
arts.sum: Marseille have enquired about Manchester United striker Marcus Rashford (27) and Bayern Munich centre-forward Mathys Tel (19), according to a report from L’Equipe. The Roberto De Zerbi-led Ligue 1 are…

arts.ttl: Olympique Marseille enquire about Bayern Munich’s Mathys Tel
arts.sum: According to L’Équipe, Olympique Marseille have enquired about the possibility of loaning in Bayern Munich striker Mathys Tel until the end of the season. Earlier in the transfer window, reports…

arts.ttl: Feyenoord vs. Bayern Munich: UEFA Champions League probable teams, match stats and LIVE blog!
arts.sum: After three wins from three in the Bundesliga in 2025, Bayern Munich head to Rotterdam to take on Feyenoord looking to take a step closer to the UEFA Champions League knockouts on Wednesday (kick-off: 9pm CET). Kane has scored 34 goals in his first 49 Champions League appearances, including 13 in 17 tournament games for Bayern.

arts.ttl: Milan to attempt January move for Santiago Gimenez
arts.sum: Serie A giants Napoli are now likely to attempt a January move for Feyenoord striker Santiago Gimenez. Luca Bianchin has reported today that Milan had tried to sign the Mexican…

arts.ttl: Daily Schmankerl: Bayern Munich target Tom Bischof rejected Arsenal; Federico Chiesa won’t leave Liverpool; Matthijs de Ligt talks pressure at Manchester United; Pundit calls for Mo Salah to join Harry Kane at Bayern; and MORE!
arts.sum: TBR Football can exclusively reveal that Tom Bischof rejected a number of Premier League clubs, including Arsenal as he is set to sign for Bayern Munich in the summer of 2025. After leaving the Dutch club for Juventus, De Ligt landed at Bayern Munich, where he had a nice run, but ultimately left last summer to go to the raging dumpster fire that is Manchester United .
